name: multi-benefit + senior health mature adult medium & large dry dog food
description: available exclusively from your veterinarian, hill's vet essentials multi-benefit +senior health mature adult 7+ medium and large breed dog food with chicken is a complete multi-benefit nutrition for mature adult dogs older than 7 years designed to support the ageing brain and body. it provides a precise nutritional balance of energy, protein, vitamins and minerals. not artificially preserved. no synthetic colours. no artificial flavours.
